title: Week Ahead — Jun 15-19
headline: Wednesday's FOMC turns the macro screws; expect volatility to spike and flows to shift hard off Powell's tone.
thesis: The whole week orbits the FOMC and economic projections on Wednesday (2026-06-17) — core retail sales and Powell's press conference create a binary risk window for SPY, QQQ, TLT, and DXY.

Watch mega-cap earnings Thursday: Accenture (ACN) and sector bellwethers like Kroger (KR), Tesco (TSCDY) — XLV defensives are leading, tech is still volatile ahead of the AI IPO liquidity drain in July.
Retail is still piling in, IPO calendar is frothy, and everyone's convinced 'soft landing' is priced — classic setup for a contrarian fade if flows turn post-FOMC; patience, don't chase.

hot_days.reason: FOMC decision, press conference, and retail sales — everything moves on Powell's dot-plot and guidance
Accenture (ACN), Kroger (KR), Tesco (TSCDY) earnings — defensive sector tells plus jobless claims and Philly Fed Index

rule_triggers: R001 — HYG/LQD: If bonds break down on Wednesday, exit equity longs immediately. FOMC is the catalyst.
R003 — SentimenTrader Smart Money under 0.3, Dumb Money over 0.7: Defensive shift, don't trust the crowd post-FOMC.
R005 — Retail demand is still elevated and IPOs are everywhere; contrarian warning, not confirmation.
R012 — Tech earnings + FOMC create high probability rally OR unwind windows. Don't bet ahead, react after.

what_im_watching.levels: SPY 731.32 (weekly EM lower), 752.18 (upper) // QQQ 704.08–738.6 // XLV 153.81 (spot), 151.79 (lower EM), ACN post-earnings volatility // IPO liquidity drain from Anthropic (ANTP) and OpenAI (OAI) July 9th.

what_im_skipping: Small-cap IPOs (PBLS, FISN) on Monday are noise — only mega-cap AI IPOs (ANTP, OAI) in July matter for flows.
closing_quote: Powell Day is binary — patience, react, don't predict. Flows > opinions, as usual.
